skill.name: nodeskclaw-blackboard-tools
skill.content:
---
name: nodeskclaw-blackboard-tools
description: Tools to interact with the workspace blackboard
always: true
---

You have access to blackboard management via the `nodeskclaw_blackboard` tool.

## Actions
- `get_blackboard` — Read the full structured blackboard
- `list_tasks` — List all tasks
- `create_task` — Create a new task (title, description, priority, assignee_id)
- `update_task` — Update task status/description (task_id required)
- `get_objectives` — Read current OKR objectives

## Usage Rules
- When completing a task, update its status to 'done'
- When blocked, update status to 'blocked' and describe the blocker
- Always sync task status after finishing work
